text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's morning, and right before classes start...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... My head feels as if it weighs a ton, and I
cannot speak with my usual grandeur.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Tch... Now it begins to throb...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I cannot deliver my heavenly wake up call
to those living on the earth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, everyone will become stricken with
anxiety. That must be avoided at any cost!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She yells out in pain from the headache, her cries
echoing down the halls.
